name: va-claim
title: VA Disability Claim — {{condition}}
description: End-to-end VA disability claim: evidence gathering, nexus letter, submission, C&P exam, decision, appeal.

vasrd_code.description: VASRD diagnostic code if known (e.g. '6260' for tinnitus)

steps.title: Gather evidence — {{condition}}
steps.description:
Collect:
- Service treatment records
- VA Medical Center records
- Private medical records
- Buddy statements
- Current symptoms documentation

Upload to Drive /VA/{{condition}}/evidence/

steps.title: Obtain nexus letter — {{condition}}
steps.description:
Nexus letter must state 'at least as likely as not' the condition is service-connected. Options:
- VA doctor (free)
- Private doctor ($500-1500)
- Telemedicine nexus services

steps.title: Submit {{claim_type}} claim — {{condition}}
steps.description:
Use /va-claims skill to generate VA-526EZ (or appropriate form for claim_type) and /va-submit to file.

Form routing:
- new → VA Form 21-526EZ
- supplemental → VA Form 20-0995
- hlr → VA Form 20-0996
- bva → VA Form 10182

steps.title: Attend C&P exam — {{condition}}
steps.description:
C&P exam preparation:
- Review symptoms and frequency
- Bring evidence binder
- Get DBQ completed on-site if possible

After exam: file travel reimbursement via /va-travel skill

steps.title: Receive decision — {{condition}}
steps.description:
Rating decision review:
- Document rating percentage
- Note effective date
- Identify any secondary conditions mentioned
- Determine if appeal is warranted
